bias_check: Standard sigma 0.15 (very high agreement). Adversarial gap 0.55 (normal). No shared bias.
improvements_acknowledged: 12 inline term tables consolidated into single appendix glossary
30s window / 50K LRU explicitly marked as 'tuning target' consistently in §2.5 and §7
consensus_remaining_bloat_3of3: §3.5 '강·약점 요약' table duplicates §3.1/§3.2 essence + §3.3 comparison table
Glossary contains general IT terms (backoff, inotify, xxhash/blake3, LRU, PSI, disk-backed buffer) violating the doc's own '일반 IT 용어 제외' declaration
consensus_remaining_2of3: §3.4 flow table includes low-value rows (TCP 재전송 누적 etc.) that don't influence decisions
estimated_next_round_score: 7.2~7.5/10 if B1 (delete §3.5) + B2 (trim 6 generic glossary entries) applied
verdict: Substantial improvement. Just below 7.0 threshold. Two consensus items remaining; both small. Document is now Phase B ready.
